Fix SRC-BUG-020 (attempt 1/3): QA: CA-003 — The requirement specifies a 'SupervisorGraph Class.

Acceptance test gap for REQ-005: Dry-Run Testing Maintainability

Reason: The requirement REQ-005 'Dry-Run Testing Maintainability' is a non-functional requirement, but the provided code contains no implementation related to dry-run testing, maintainability testing, or any testing infrastructure. The code includes a web server entry point (build/main.py), a CLI entry point (src/__main__.py), and a TypeScript interface (IEditorAdapter.ts), but none of these implement dry-run testing functionality or maintainability features. There are no test configurations, no dry-run mode flags, no test harnesses, and no maintainability metrics or validation logic present.

Severity: high

ACTION: Implement REQ-005 according to the spec.

PROJECT: /Users/dmitry/Documents/Droid/spec-editor2
Read FILES TO CHECK mentioned above before making changes.
Use bash to run: python -m pytest tests/ -q to verify fixes.
